added_paragraphs: The output from our generative AI features may include non-generative content (such as Adobe Stock assets) that is subject to the terms of your agreement with Adobe. This non-generative content will be noted in the user interface or related documentation.
llm_summary: The Adobe Generative AI User Guidelines now specify that outputs from generative AI features may include non-generative content, like Adobe Stock assets, which are governed by the user's agreement with Adobe. This non-generative content will be indicated in the user interface or related documentation. No other changes were made to the document.
